clusters.justification: These terms map onto subcortical arousal and cortical salience networks, reflecting a broad functional axis encompassing emotional reactivity, homeostatic state processing, and valence.
This cluster reflects the engagement of frontostriatal circuitry underlying subjective valuation, incentive salience, and goal-directed decision-making.
These concepts consistently co-activate within the large-scale default mode network, anchoring an overarching domain of internally constructed abstract representations regarding the self and others.
